tasks.title: Add UpdateTaskPayload type and updateTask API client function
tasks.description: Add the UpdateTaskPayload interface to types/index.ts and the updateTask(spaceId, taskId, patch) function to api/client.ts wrapping PUT /spaces/:spaceId/tasks/:taskId.
acceptance_criteria: UpdateTaskPayload interface exported from types/index.ts with optional fields: title, type, description, assigned
updateTask() in client.ts calls PUT /api/v1/spaces/:spaceId/tasks/:taskId with the patch body
Return type is Promise<Task>
Existing client.ts exports are unchanged
Unit test: updateTask sends correct method, path, and body

tasks.title: Extend useAppStore with detailTask state and panel actions
tasks.description: Add detailTask: Task | null, openDetailPanel(task), closeDetailPanel(), and updateTask(taskId, patch) to useAppStore. updateTask must apply an optimistic update to the tasks board and refresh detailTask after the API resolves.
acceptance_criteria: detailTask is null on initial store load
openDetailPanel(task) sets detailTask to the given task
closeDetailPanel() sets detailTask to null
updateTask() calls api.updateTask with the active spaceId, taskId, and patch
On success: the task is updated in-place in the tasks board (all columns searched) and detailTask is refreshed to the returned Task
On error: detailTask and tasks board are NOT modified; showToast('Failed to save', 'error') is called
isMutating flag is set to true during the call and false after (success or error)
Unit tests cover: open/close actions, successful update (board + detailTask sync), error path (toast called, state unchanged)

tasks.title: Implement TaskDetailPanel component
tasks.description: Create frontend/src/components/board/TaskDetailPanel.tsx. The panel reads detailTask from useAppStore, renders all four editable fields with the interaction model described in the blueprint (auto-save on blur for title/assigned, auto-save on change for type, explicit save button for description). Includes backdrop overlay, close button, Escape key handler, focus trap, and focus-return on close.
acceptance_criteria: Component renders null when detailTask is null
Panel slides in from the right with a 200 ms CSS transition (translateX)
Backdrop is semi-transparent; clicking it calls closeDetailPanel()
Close button (×) in the header calls closeDetailPanel()
Escape key anywhere in the panel calls closeDetailPanel()
Focus is trapped inside the panel while open
On open, focus lands on the title input
On close, focus returns to the element that triggered open
Title input: blurring with a changed value calls store.updateTask with { title }
Type control: changing selection immediately calls store.updateTask with { type }
Assigned input: blurring with a changed value calls store.updateTask with { assigned }
Description textarea: 'Save description' button calls store.updateTask with { description }
All editable fields are disabled while store.isMutating is true
Panel is fully read-only (all inputs disabled) while activeRun is non-null for this task
Read-only metadata shown: task id, column label, createdAt, updatedAt (refreshes after save)
Panel width: w-full on mobile, w-[380px] on sm breakpoint and above
ARIA: role=dialog, aria-modal=true, aria-label='Task detail'
All interactive elements have visible focus rings using ring-2 ring-primary

tasks.title: Add expand trigger to TaskCard
tasks.description: Modify TaskCard to add a small expand icon button in the card header. Clicking the task title or the expand icon calls openDetailPanel(task) from the store.
acceptance_criteria: An expand icon button appears in the top-right area of the card header, alongside the Badge
Clicking the icon calls store.openDetailPanel(task)
Clicking the task title text also calls store.openDetailPanel(task)
The title text is styled as a subtle link (cursor-pointer, hover:text-primary) to signal interactivity
Expand button has aria-label='Open task detail'
The expand button does not trigger drag events (e.stopPropagation on its drag handlers)
Existing card layout (badge, description, assigned avatar, timestamps, attachments, footer) is visually unchanged

tasks.title: Mount TaskDetailPanel in App
tasks.description: Import and render <TaskDetailPanel /> in App.tsx as a sibling of <Board />, outside any scrollable container, so it overlays the full viewport.
acceptance_criteria: TaskDetailPanel is rendered at App root level, not inside Board or Column
Panel z-index is above the board and below any existing top-level modals (e.g. CreateTaskModal)
No visual regressions on the board layout when the panel is closed
Board columns remain scrollable while the panel is open

tasks.title: Write unit tests for TaskDetailPanel
tasks.description: Write Vitest + React Testing Library tests for TaskDetailPanel covering: open/close lifecycle, all four field save paths (auto-save and explicit save), disabled state during isMutating, read-only state during activeRun, keyboard accessibility (Escape), and focus management.
acceptance_criteria: Test: panel is not rendered when detailTask is null
Test: panel renders with task field values pre-populated
Test: blurring title input triggers store.updateTask with correct patch
Test: changing type control triggers store.updateTask immediately
Test: blurring assigned input triggers store.updateTask with correct patch
Test: clicking 'Save description' button triggers store.updateTask with description
Test: clicking backdrop calls closeDetailPanel
Test: clicking close button calls closeDetailPanel
Test: pressing Escape calls closeDetailPanel
Test: all inputs are disabled when isMutating is true
Test: all inputs are disabled when activeRun matches task id
Test: focus is on title input on panel open
Test coverage for TaskDetailPanel >= 90%

tasks.title: Write unit tests for store updateTask action
tasks.description: Add Vitest unit tests for the new store actions (openDetailPanel, closeDetailPanel, updateTask) in useAppStore.
acceptance_criteria: Test: openDetailPanel sets detailTask to the given task
Test: closeDetailPanel sets detailTask to null
Test: updateTask calls api.updateTask with correct arguments
Test: on success, tasks board is updated in the correct column and detailTask is refreshed
Test: on error, tasks board and detailTask are unchanged, showToast('error') is called
Test: isMutating is true during the call and false after
